title: The Orang mod
description: A silly mod that contains the weird minecraft ideas that i come up with at school. Also very orange
body:
It's best if you play this blind becuase of just the amount of silly but if you want here's a feature list


<details>
<summary>Feature List</summary>

## Speed and Jump blocks
They do what you'd expect

## Orang items

Nine Orangs can be crafted into one Orang Block which lets you permanently delete any item in the game

![Orang Block GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23771f15da721537434746c90f2cd34844e3101b.png)

## Orang Biome
The orang biome is a new biome that brings along a new wood type, orangwood.

Everything is orange

![Orang Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac27815e1b311ec1898d550942034e95199d5029_0.webp)

## liamAJ2016

liamAJ2016 is a neutral mob that spawns in the orang biome. It doesn't like orang blocks and drops one Orang

![liamAJ2016](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c2fe32fdfc7d6c91a43a10c2ef38ec48c3cb57f.png)
trust me this is a mob not a player

## SolarFif

SolarFif is a Hostile mob that only spawns at night in the Orang Biome. liamAJ2016s are afraid of SolarFif. SolarFif attacks the player with ranged fireball attacks that make anvil noises. they also think you're Captain America. they drop Solar Coins that apon consuption, turn into Exposed cut copper stairs and set you on fire for 15 seconds. Oh also, SolarFif can fly

![SolarFif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f16e2a9b93fcc536898a0348d4018eadb45390e_0.webp)

## Orang Armour

There is a new armour set made out of Orang.

## TABLE

TABLE is a new fluid that makes any entity instantly explode apon contact, unless they are wearing full orang armour.

![TABLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e435f42bda13c6c02414b8bb265c109e341eea3.png)

## Orang Dimension

Smelt an Orang and right click a frame of orange concrete with it to open an Orang Portal.

![Orang Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/252710d62359906ad86a81a04c234055878f6617_0.webp)

The Orang Dimension on the other side of the portal is like the overworld but the only biome is the Orang Biome, SolarFif spawn during the day, all stone is replaced with orangwood planks and all water is replaced with TABLE

</details>
